subject: [COMMON] Run Autopep8 tox profile
commit_message:
[COMMON] Run Autopep8 tox profile

And improve somme comments indentation.

PEP8 is a set of rules and coding conventions for the Python language.
The autopep8 tool automatically formats Python code to conform
to the PEP 8 style guide.

https://pypi.org/project/autopep8/
https://www.python.org/dev/peps/pep-0008/

Issue-ID: OOM-2643
Signed-off-by: Guillaume Lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ifd4f0ab185973e82d9971d1085bb646b7a3a98c2
